title: Property Tax Record
description: Property tax assessment and payment record from a county assessor or tax collector.

parcel_number.description: Assessor's parcel number (APN) or folio number. Commonly found in: county assessor website, tax collector portal.

address.description: Property street address. Commonly found in: county assessor website, tax records.

city.description: City of the property. Commonly found in: county assessor website.

county.description: County of the property. Commonly found in: county assessor website.

state.description: State of the property. Commonly found in: county assessor website.

zip_code.description: ZIP code of the property. Commonly found in: county assessor website, property address.

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the property. Commonly found in: geocoding API, GIS data.

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the property. Commonly found in: geocoding API, GIS data.

owner_name.description: Name of the property owner. Commonly found in: county assessor website, tax records.

owner_mailing_address.description: Mailing address of the property owner. Commonly found in: county assessor website.

property_type.description: Property use type (e.g., single family, commercial). Commonly found in: county assessor website, property details.

land_value_usd.description: Assessed value of the land in USD. Commonly found in: county assessor website, assessment breakdown.

improvement_value_usd.description: Assessed value of improvements in USD. Commonly found in: county assessor website, assessment breakdown.

total_assessed_value_usd.description: Total assessed value in USD. Commonly found in: county assessor website, tax bill.

market_value_usd.description: Estimated market value in USD. Commonly found in: county assessor website, appraisal.

tax_year.description: Tax year for this record. Commonly found in: county assessor website, tax bill.

annual_tax_usd.description: Annual property tax amount in USD. Commonly found in: tax collector portal, tax bill.

tax_rate_pct.description: Effective tax rate as a percentage. Commonly found in: county tax rate schedule.

exemptions.description: Tax exemptions applied (e.g., homestead, senior). Commonly found in: county assessor website, exemption records.

tax_status.description: Current tax payment status. Commonly found in: tax collector portal.

last_sale_price_usd.description: Price from the most recent sale in USD. Commonly found in: county recorder, deed records.

last_sale_date.description: Date of the most recent sale. Commonly found in: county recorder, deed records.

zoning.description: Zoning classification of the property. Commonly found in: county assessor website, zoning map.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
